name: academorix/delegation
purpose: Time-bounded delegation of a User's roles to a delegate + PlatformUser impersonation sessions of tenant users for support and debug.
capabilities: RoleDelegation aggregate (dlg_ prefix) with start/end windows
ImpersonationSession aggregate (imp_ prefix) for staff act-as flows
when_to_use: A tenant admin needs to temporarily hand off their role to a colleague, or Academorix staff needs to act-as a tenant user for support.
when_not_to_use: For permanent role assignment or grant-based access, use academorix/rbac or academorix/grants instead.
